title: Playground Overhaul
description: Prompt editor, scenario/persona selectors, tool call rendering, and chat restart. Manual testing is now a first-class workflow.

title: Scorecard Builder
description: 3-column layout with category sidebar, criteria cards, and per-criteria weights. Build evaluation rubrics visually.

title: Reactive Persona Strategy
description: Personas reason about agent responses using internal tools before replying. Designed for red-team and stress testing.

title: 5 New Evaluation Criteria
description: Hallucination detection, knowledge retention, conversation completeness, role adherence, and RAG faithfulness.

title: Tool Fixture Mocking
description: Define mock tools with parameter schemas and conditional response rules. Verify tool calls without hitting real APIs.

title: Smarter API Key Resolution
description: Keys resolve from Settings DB automatically. No more "No LLM evaluator available" errors.

title: Execution Auto-Polling
description: Running scenarios show a live spinner badge. Results appear the moment execution completes.

title: Red-Team Persona Presets
description: 5 built-in presets: jailbreak attacker, PII extractor, BOLA tester, prompt injector, and social engineer.

title: Initial Release
description: Multi-turn conversation simulation, scorecard evaluation, persona engine, CLI, and dashboard.
